scripts.validate:stage1: npm run manifest:sync && node scripts/validate-stage1.mjs && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.validate:stage2: npm run manifest:sync && node scripts/validate-stage2.mjs && eslint . && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.validate:stage3: npm run manifest:sync && node scripts/validate-stage3.mjs && eslint . && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.validate:stage4: npm run manifest:sync && node scripts/validate-stage4.mjs && eslint . && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.validate:final: npm run manifest:sync && node scripts/validate-final.mjs && npm run lint && tsc -b && vite build
